title: Ontology
description: Ontology documents overview material for Ontology in the knowledge domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights What Ontology Is, Core Building Blocks, Ontology Versus Similar Artifacts, Practical Example, and How Ontologies Help in Practice, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include taxonomy, schema, knowledge graph, metadata, and knowledge, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is knowledge / concepts / ontology, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
